testcase.name: test_tc03_admin_users_page_access

error.message: failed on setup with "urllib3.exceptions.MaxRetryError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=4444): Max retries exceeded with url: /wd/hub/session (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=4444): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it"))"

testcase.error:
C:\Users\charith reddy\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connection.py:204: in _new_conn sock = connection.create_connection( C:\Users\charith reddy\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\util\connection.py:85: in create_connection raise err C:\Users\charith reddy\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\util\connection.py:73: in create_connection sock.connect(sa) E ConnectionRefusedError: [WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: C:\Users\charith reddy\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:787: in urlopen response = self._make_request( C:\Users\charith reddy\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:493: in _make_request conn.request( C:\Users\charith reddy\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connection.py:500: in request self.endheaders() C:\Users\charith reddy\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\http\client.py:1353: in endheaders self._send_output(message_body, encode_chunked=encode_chunked) C:\Users\charith reddy\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\http\client.py:1113: in _send_output self.send(msg) C:\Users\charith reddy\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\http\client.py:1057: in send self.connect() C:\Users\charith reddy\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connection.py:331: in connect self.sock = self._new_conn() C:\Users\charith reddy\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connection.py:219: in _new_conn raise NewConnectionError( E urllib3.exceptions.NewConnectionError: HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=4444): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: conftest.py:35: in driver drv = DriverFactory.get_driver() utils\driver_factory.py:31: in get_driver return DriverFactory._create_remote_driver() utils\driver_factory.py:75: in _create_remote_driver driver = webdriver.Remote( C:\Users\charith C:\Users\charith reddy\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\remote\remote_connection.py:322: in _request response = self._conn.request(method, url, body=body,
